I want to be as detailed as possible. Firstly as I write this it's more of first impressions than an actual review. I'm 5'9" and currently weigh 243lbs. I ordered these pants based off of Amazon's recommendations in size 18. These pants just fit. And I don't mean that in a bad way. They are not too big or too tight anywhere. They just fit me. Lol. I got some junk in the trunk. I struggle with chub rub and wide calves. Again nothing feels constrained. The material has that rough texture like normal jeans. It's made with 3% spandex, which surprisingly gives a lot of stretch overall to the pants. My usual go to pair of high waisted black jeans have been Old Navy's Rockstar super skinny high rise 24/7 sculpt pants in size 14 regular. These pants are a pretty close match. Those jeans have been my everything. I work all day in those pants and live in those pants. And I can't get them anymore. That's how I ended up here trying these pants. I could probably size down to a 16 for a more fitted pair. But I'm not going to return these ones. They are high rise for sure. If you need pants to work in like me these will do. I can bend/squat down in these and not fear I'm revealing my backside. I did see a review before ordering these about the back pockets being more outward/on the side. And they might be further outward than most jeans. But that's okay with me. I carry my phone in my back pocket so having the pockets more outward prevents me from crushing my phone. Overall, I'm happy with the purchase and the first impressions. I don't know how well they will hold up with lots of use. I go through jeans and shoes frequently. I do a lot walking/bending/squating etc at work. And maintain an active lifestyle outside of work too. So these pants will get a lot of work out of them. If anything major happens I will update this review. Hope this helps.

I wanted a pair of casual pants with pockets to hold my phone. The fit is good but an inch or so too long on me (5’ 4”). There is a drawstring to cinch the waist but I did not know there were drawstrings around the bottom of the pants too. If you cinch the legs, the loop of stretch cord is left hanging out and looks unsightly. My solution was to tuck the loop up under the pants leg and that kept it out of sight. There is one cargo pocket on the right leg and regular pockets at the top. There are no pockets on the back of the pants. I would recommend these pants if you are looking for lightweight, casual pants with storage.

If you're tall, be aware that these will be high-waters on you. I'm 5'8" and would not be able to wear these without looking silly. These have a real zipper and button in case you were curious, they aren't a pull-on pant. These were a "no" for me based on how they fit my body, but construction-wise they are high quality. I didn't see any loose threads, crooked stitching, or anything else. If you wear a smaller size and are 5'6" or shorter, these might work better for you.

I usually wear a large and that is what I ordered. These jeans are cotton, polyester, and elastane, so there is much more stretch than I had thought there would be. The pockets are deep. These fit me very well, and I'm more than pleased with them. There is no gap in the waist. Without a doubt, they will be super comfy to wear. I hope they wash well.

I wanted to write a review bc there are so many mixed reviews for these. I love them and to me they fit true to size. I wear anywhere from a size 27-29 and went for the size 8 based on reviews. Right in the middle, they fit excellent. They are just a tad short, but I’m used to that being 5’9” but not short enough for me to return them. There is room in the waist, but I think going down a size would’ve been too tight and too short. I say go for it!

I was a bit hesitant but got these last minute for a job interview I got a size small I’m normally a 6 in pants and based it off the size chart i am 5,6 and got. 31” unseen they fit pretty good on my thighs and calf’s but the wait was a little big witch happens with all my pants so can’t complain too much I ended up tucking my shirt in anyway so I couldn’t really notice but they do the job and look nice.

I was a little afraid to order these but glad I did. I got them because I am preparing for a colder weather trip. These seem very warm. I am very pleased on how they look and fit. I normally take a size 10 but I went by the size chart and got a size 12. They fit perfectly, if anything maybe a little snug. For reference I am 5 ‘ 7 “ and 140 lbs.

I was a little confused by the varied size reviews so I ordered both a medium and a large. I am 5’2 150 athletic legs and a little bigger in the waist. The mediums fit perfect!! Length wise they’re a little long but you can cuff them or tuck them like I did. They are super comfortable. Rest nicely and don’t give me a muffin top. Will be ordering more colors!

I was a little disappointed at first - they are shapeless and not very attractive right out of the bag. But I think boot cut pants need to have a little crease in them so with some careful pressing ("cool" iron and a press cloth) they now look great! And very comfortable - just the right amount of stretch and awesome pockets!I'm 5'3", about 115 and these are size small, 30" inseam.

I was a little hesitant about buying dress pants on Amazon because I was worried about quality but these have blown me away! They fit so nicely on my frame and aren’t thin like I was afraid of. They’re not short on the legs, and I can’t style these with flats or with heels. I bought an XS and I’m 5’3” and ~125lbs for reference. I usually wear a size 2 or 26” waist but these run a little big. I have a small, yet comfortable amount of room in the waist for sitting/eating, but nothing a belt can’t help keep up. No complaints! Overall would recommend! Honestly I might buy these in a few colors 😅

I was a little nervous ordering these belts for this price; I assumed the quality would be cheap. It’s not! The quality is great, and the colors and prints are even better! My biggest struggle is finding belts that fit my waist and hips, that aren’t children’s belts. This was perfect for me! I am 4’11” and weigh 92lbs, for size reference.
I was a little skeptical but they exceeded my expectations. I will be definitely purchasing other colors. I'm 5'5, 175 pounds and the large fit great.

I was a little skeptical when ordering but I am obsessed to say the least!!! It fits like a glove and is not too tight. It hugs in the right places, stretchy, and so flattering. I am 5’7 and it was the perfect length. Not too short and not too long! I cannot recommend this dress enough!!

I was A little stepped cool at first because the reviews were either good or bad but these are the best pair of jeans I’ve ever bought. I’m 5”11 so it’s hard to find decent length jeans, Great purchase, will definitely buy another pair. I purchase a medium!

I was a little uncertain about what size to order based on the reviews until I noticed that each of the different colors/styles (blue, blue4, blue5) seemed to have the same likes and dislikes. I bought the blue in XL, a size up from my usual L (size 14). They fit perfectly. There was some odor when I first opened the bag but it went away after hanging over the a/c vent overnight. They are snug around the knees but not tight thanks to the soft, super stretchy fabric. The length comes to the floor in my bare feet. For reference, I am 5’7” and weigh 168lbs.

I was a little unsure when I ordered these pants, but I'm so glad I gave them a shot. For context, I am 5'2 and plus size. I always have problems ordering clothes that make me feel good. These pants made me feel cute from the get go. They are so comfortable, soft and very lightweight. The elastic around the band doesn't roll down and you can wear them with or without the belt. For someone of my height they do fit a little different than the picture, but nothing a good altering job can't fix. The fabric is hight quality and very forgiving. I highly recommend these pants.

I was a little worried about the sizing of these jeans but read through reviews and was told to order 1 size bigger than your usual since it's junior sizing. I'm 5'3" about 155lbs and typically buy size 8-10 so I ordered size 11. They fit very well, have extra room with stretch. I hope they don't get too loose with all the stretch they have. The length was spot on. They are extremely soft feeling also! The only downside so far is the front color is slightly lighter than the back. I feel like the picture portrays a darker color. Over all I'm super happy with the fit and light feel of these jeans. Not sure of the quality yet since they're brand new. I would guess because they're made of stretch and light weight material they won't last super long with frequent use.

I was a little worried about them fitting me. I’ve lost weight n I wasn’t sure of what size jeans I wore. I love the Levi signature jeans. I bought these jeans over 2 years ago n love them, they are the only jeans I wear or like. I’m 5”3 n weight 145 n size 4 long fit me good. I got them a tad bit longer in case they shrink. They are a little big but it’s okay. I will be buying more n my husband is buying me some for Christmas due to all my other jeans are huge on me.

I was actually impressed with how much I like these! I’m 5’5 about 130 for reference and I got a size 6. They fit great and on the comfier/looser side, which is what I wanted. Docked one star because I think the photos make them look more like structured/stiffer jeans but the material is softer, which isn’t bad and prob why they’re so comfy. Definitely recommend!

I was actually surprised this was my fav pair to try of the 3 different brands I ordered. They’re super comfy. I’m muscular in the legs and am 5’0 tall. I do NOT put my hands in my back pockets much with an occasional phone, which is in my right back pocket. The left has started to tear at the corner already, and I’ve worn these a handful of times, mainly at work for casual Fridays. I can sew them back with reinforcement, though it’s only been 6 weeks since I bought them. I’ll be ordering another pair. The hole is the only reason it’s a 4 star.
I was afraid of the bad revew! but I was surprised! I loved them! I'm 5.4 and weigh 120lb for your reference.

I was apprehensive about getting these pants because I thought they might not be flattering on me, but YEOOOOO I wear these boys like TWICE A WEEK IM IN LOVE. They're cute asf with a crop top or oversized sweater tucked in!!! And theyre so COMFORTABLE. The waist is completely elastic like pajama pants, but still has a button and zipper to look like jeans. I usually wear them with a belt to sinch in my waist a little more, but they're cute without one too! The pockets are DEEP too I can actually fit my phone in em its wild. I get compliments literally every single time I wear them! The only thing I could say is if you're on the taller side like me (5'10/11) the leg holes kind of ride up if you sit with your legs crossed or bend over. Just wear long socks or tights underneath if its cold, otherwise it really doesnt even matter. I think I got a 3xl just because I was scared they were Asian sizes and I wear a size 14/16 jeans so u know how it is lol. They fit GREAT but I could have comfortably gone down to a 2x or maybe even 1x. They really really feel like you're just wearing pajamas I love it

I was apprehensive about these but glad I purchased. This is more of a stretchy Jean material. I am 5’4” and 130 lbs with thicker thighs and 34DD and the medium fits perfect. They hit just a little below my ankles. No problems with adjusting the straps. I did have to tighten them quite a bit so the crotch wouldn’t sag.

I was back and forth with seller about the appropriate size for me, I kept changing from L to XL, both were inaccurate reviews and seller. Listen when I say, there is no way a person weighing 200 lbs plus can fit into a XL., you won’t be able to breath or button up the jeans. I know because I used my own common scene and ordered the size I knew would fit at my size. 190lbs and went with the XL and the fit was perfect. The seller indicated I get a size 3X….REALLY…never in my entire life wore nothing higher than a XL. The reviews are insane as we’ll. All I would say if you want a looser fit, size up, other then that use my guide, it’s more then most. They are stretch and if your over 200 lbs don’t buy no XL you will be sending them back for a larger size. 170-180lbs Large. Shipping was guaranteed sooner too, that didn’t happen, wasn’t too long though. Very nice pair of jeans overall. Listen to your body, if you need to squeeze into any pair of jeans then that’s on you.

I was blown away by the quality and feel of these pants right out of the package. They have a good weight to them and feel amazing on. They fit true to size. I also really appreciate the inseam options, as well as the pockets! I chose a 31" inseam, size large.

I was curious how this cut of jean would fit me but wanted to give it a try. I actually loved it. The jeans are well made and run pretty close to size. For reference I am 5' 2" and 115lbs and usually wear a size 4. These run from small to x-large. I ordered the small and there was still a little room but it is supposed to be a relaxed fit. They are a good weight but not a heavy jean. They are a cropped fit and being a shorty it still ended up being slightly cropped so if you are a taller girlie it will crop even higher on your leg. They are very comfortable and have a slight stretch to them as well. All in all I am very happy with these pants.

I was drawn to these jeans because it said they were mid-rise (and on sale). I can’t do high waisted jeans and I have struggled to find mid-rise flares at a reasonable price. After reading the reviews I wasn’t sure if I would like them. Many sizes were sold out because they were on sale. I ordered an 8 regular in a blue wash and an 8 short in a grey wash. As you can see from the pictures, the regular comes up to my belly button. I’m only 5’ 3.5” and weigh about 135 but still. I was disappointed. They were definitely long, but I thought maybe with a heel I could get away with it. Then I tried on the short. They didn’t come up as high (although still a little higher than I wished). And the length was perfect. Some people said their size was a little loose. These are definitely not loose on me. I’m actually hoping they might loosen up a bit after I wear them. I’m returning the 8 regular and plan to keep the 8 short. I haven’t worn them other than to try on so I can’t yet speak for how they will hold their shape after all day. They do have some stretch to them; enough to make them conformable and not stiff.

I was excited for these wide leg jeans - and overall - I'm happy with them. I am on the smaller end of medium - 5'6", 150lbs. I ordered a size 6 and they fit overall well - maybe just a bit tighter in the waist. My observations: PROS: * quality denim and well made. Not too heavy, but not too thin either. * stop at a great spot and flow well as I move around * wore to a sunny tournament and stayed cool - lots of airflow up into the pants which was great! CONS: * They have a nice leather patch on the waist that says 'GENLECK' - I just used a seam ripper and removed it. * The 'back end' photo was taken by my 9yo daughter - so her height/angle - but 'do these make my rear look funny'? Something just isn't great with the cut and fit of these pants (normally not a problem for me).

I was excited to see these came in short size as it’s usually hard for me to find pants that don’t drag on the floor, but they were still too long. I’m 5’0” and usually a size 2 and these were too baggy and a couple inches too long. Cute style though

I was excited to try the Motion Flex because I like the softer, stretchier material. I am a perfect fit for the Lee’s 8 Short mid rise regular fit straight jeans, which have a 29” inseam. I thought these ones would have the same length, but even after confirming that I did in fact get the 8 Short midrise regular fit straight (meaning, exactly the same size and style) in the Flex-Motion version, they were way too long. I laid them out with my regular pair and measured only to find that the Flex-Motion pair has a 31” inseam instead of a 29” - a whole 2” difference. I expect that kind of difference on bootcut but not on straight. Really disappointing.

I was excited when the jeans came. I tried them on right away. But the have to be returned because they fit big on me. I do have a gut, hip dips and normal size butt. These jeans gapped on the sides, made my butt look flat and the stretch was good but not a good look on me. I ordered a 4x because of the reviews. So I'm sad to have return it, but glad I can order a smaller size. I'm a 5"7' weighing 225.

I was excited when these overalls went on a flash sale as I had been going back and forth about whether to buy them ($45 for a pair of overalls is slightly expensive IMO, but I know pricing are continually rising for everything). I ordered the olive green color, and was disappointed when it came— it is definitely greenish, but seems more like a dark khaki on? Kind of giving safari ranger vibes, which was not what I was looking for. Second thing I noticed was that the quality was also lacking. While the fabric itself is very comfortable and soft, there are loose strings everywhere and a seam on the back was only partially finished. The length was good on me though— I adjusted the straps all the way and they came down right to my ankle, which doesn’t always happen as someone who is 5’4”. Unfortunately I’m returning because I very much dislike the color and the quality is not great.

They are a good quality pair of pants, I just feel like this big of a flare is not suited to my body type after seeing it in the mirror.

I was expecting these jeans to be like the viral cargo jeans just without the pockets and all but they turned out way too baggy. HIGHLY RECOMMEND SIZING DOWN! These jeans run large. However, they did fit well around my butt so if I would order an xs, they would probably be right around my butt. Disappointed, will have to order another color in the hopes that it’s accurate this time.

I was expecting to not like this product because I thought the color was gonna be different and the length might not work because Im on 5'1". However this has become my favorite pants to wear when I have events to go to for college that involves professional attire. I absolutely love them

I was extremely hesitant to purchase these pants online because I have trouble finding things that fit me just right. These pants can be dressed up or down and stretch and feel as comfortable as leggings. For reference, I’m 5’4” & 254lbs

I was given a pair of the ' Mandala Blue' harem pants pattern almost four years ago. I am 5'5" and about 130 lbs, and these are a large. They've washed well, gone through the washer and dryer no problem, and are very comfortable. All of the seams and elastic have held up.I am pleased enough that I am planning to buy another pair, in a different pattern, because ever since I realized the pattern lineup formed an unfortunate target on my backside, I haven't been able to wear them in public. I can turn them around, but having the target on the front isn't much better. Consider your pattern selection carefully if this concerns you!Update: after writing this I bought two more pairs of the solid colors. When they arrived I was upset, because they were stiff, huge, and looked like plastic. Fortunately they shrank significantly when I washed them, and lost the aggressive shine. Now they look and feel more like cotton/linen, and I don't feel like I'm in a 90's music video. Rating stays the same.

I was going back and forth on how I would rate this, four or five stars, but went with five. These are definitely wide legged jeans and that’s what I ordered. However, they may be too wide legged for me and that’s why I was thinking of rating them 4, but that’s not the fault of the jeans that I’m not sure to wearing wide legs jeans (been doing skinny jeans for way too long). As far as a nice pair of jeans at a reasonable price these are great. I’m 5’9” and around 150 lbs and ordered a size 8 in them (I always go up in jeans) and they fit well. The land right above my ankles, which is what I expected, the color is great, and they are wide. I’m just not used to me in wide legged jeans or pants, but as skinny jeans have been out for quite awhile it’s high time I get with it and get used to it. So, that’s why I’m eating them 5 stars. They’re great jeans at a great price.

I was hesitant at first about purchasing these, but glad I did! Ordering in the black next…love that they don’t drag the ground and still gives me the look I want to achieve without wearing heels. I’m 177lb, 5’5’ish… size 10. I ordered a large bc I have thick thighs and hips.

I was hesitant to buy since there weren’t many reviews but this skort is SO cute and so comfortable! I ordered a size up (L) because I was between, it’s a little roomy, I probably could have gone a size down and ordered my usual size (M). Either would’ve been fine. I’m 5’5” and 145-150lbs for reference. It’s really good quality, would buy again in my colors. Ignore my horribly dusty mirror 😂

I was hesitant to buy these because I’m so small (I’m 5.0 and 107lbs rn at 13 weeks PPW was 100 I ordered a XS for reference)I usually wear size 1-3 in jeans but obviously I can’t put the buttons together now so this is the next best thing! I like my jeans to have no lose spots anywhere! These are great!! So much better than I thought and so comfortable!! Really glad I got these!

They are slightly baggy in some areas and a little long but not quite dragging on the floor. I don’t like the placement of the zipper and clasp in the back as it is hard to reach. Overall really comfy and stretchy

I was hesitant to order jeans online but after reading some reviews I decided to chance it. I love these jeans. I’m 5’8” and 130 lbs. and size 6 fits perfect. The length is perfect. One review said the jeans were difficult to pull up. I did not find it difficult at all. Material is very soft. I love them!

I was hesitant to purchase jeans online because I wasn't sure what I would do if they didn't fit. It's one thing to purchase another pair of jeans when you already have a pair and you know your size. It's completely different to purchase a pair blind without having a reference point. So, I looked at the reviews and I saw where a woman who is 5'3" says they fit her well. She said they fit "perfect". I'm 5'2' so I was SOLD because of her review. I mean, the jeans look great on the model, but I wasn't sure they'd look or feel great on me, especially since I'm short. Well, blow me over with a feather! i am so excited I pulled the trigger. The color is beautiful. They're a deep, dark blue. The length is perfect. Like I said, I'm an inch shorter than the other woman and that 1 inch does not make them go from the perfect length to too long. They fit well in the stomach. I have a stomach. I birthed two children and I'm fat. Unless I pay a doctor in Mexico to fix this, that stomach and I will be best friends until I die. They are not too tight. They stretch to accommodate my belly well. I usually wear a 12 which fit my belly well, but are too big in the legs. They sag, and I'm not a 20 year old boy who sags on purpose. i just don't have enough going on to fill out the pants. i chose a 10. It was available and I'm losing weight by eating keto. Although I've lost 6 or 7 pounds and these fit GREAT, they would fit better if I lost another 5 pounds. I don't have a great shaped lower (or upper) body and they're not magic, but they look good and feel good. I don't know about sewing, but whatever "darts" they added to enhance my shape did a pretty decent job.

I was hesitant to purchase these pants based on mixed opinions in posted reviews and overall score. Being a Latina with curves and big thighs, it’s sometimes challenging to find the right fit. For context I wear size 10 or 12 depending on the style, material, cut, etc… I bought these in a 12 to ensure they weren’t too fitted! The material is great quality, very soft and flowy, they are roomy in the thighs, fabric not overly thin so we’re not transparent as you can see in the pics (I zoomed in on all so you can really see the details), and the cut fit very pretty. The waist has some elasticity in the back and the zipper is in the side. I’m 5’5 and length was perfect. I can wear with flats, kitten or regular 3”heels without a problem. Finally, classy pants that fit right! I plan on getting them in more colors.

I was honestly shocked that these arrived in as good of condition and were absolutely wearable! I am 4'11" approximately 130 lb and I bought a size medium and they fit perfectly. I did have to put on a decent size heel but with the heel I didn't walk on them and they didn't drag the ground at all. The inside lining is super comfy too! The only reason I can't give these five stars is because I wanted them a little bit more elasticy around the waist to give a little more suck in power and because the sequins did rub a little and get caught on each other where my thighs rub together on the inside. I think the rubbing is a fix that you could probably craft with some sealant or maybe fabric adhesive. I got compliments on these all night long and I could have stayed in them for hours! I would say these are a must purchase for any party!!

I was honestly shocked. Amazon suggested I order 30", which I did. I fully expected to have to return them because I have a hard time finding jeans that fit me (I ordered on a lark). But the fit was PERFECT. I'm 5'6", 140 lbs, 33" waist, slim build... and these jeans are an absolute perfect fit. They're super comfortable. And they look amazing.

I was hopeful for these pants, but they aren't going to work for me unless I lose at least 20lbs. I am 5'7", 290lbs and generally wear XL-XXL comfortably, with the XXL being loose at times. I got a size XXL in these, and they are TIGHT. I won't wear them as is, as they are uncomfortably tight. You can see in the attached photos. Also, they are several inches longer than I thought they would be. Now, let's get to the good. The material is good quality. Not quite the old-school jean material, but definitely better than your usual nowadays jean material. They don't have much stretch--well, at least not enough to help with the fact that they run 1-2 sizes small. Now, I'm not used to buying "jeans" using a sizing scale of Small-XXL, but numbered sizes, but the sizing chart included stated XXL was 20-22, which is definitely not the case, as I fit comfortably into size 20 jeans that have some give, and 22s are generally a little roomy. The buttons and zipper are nice quality. The overall look, including color, is great. SO, as long you get the right size, these will be a nice addition to your wardrobe.

I was hoping for pants that were like thicker faux leather and these were not what I expected. They were thinner and felt like leggings, but with back pockets. Despite the fact that they weren’t what I expected, they fit perfectly and felt amazing while on. They were accidentally thrown in with the regular wash and dry cycles and it didn’t ruin them at all. I don’t normally wash and dry new clothes this way, but was very pleased that they were not shrink or get damaged. For reference, I am 5’4”, 140lbs and the large fit well. I feel like a medium might fit well, also because the stretch is great.

I was hoping that these would be great lounge pants, maybe even comfy enough to sleep in. The fabric is not at all what I expected, and it definitely would not be described as soft. The first thing that struck me when I opened this package was a label stating that these were waterproof. What the heck? I somehow missed that in the description, and it was certainly not something I needed. They are also SPF, according to the tags, and that is ok by me, but also not something I was seeking. These pants are a bit too short on me (I'm 5'6") even without shoes. There is a slit on the side, but it is unnecessary for ease of dressing because the fit is very loose. In fact, the legs are too baggy for my taste. I think the relaxed fit would be ok if the fabric was more like soft, lounge pants, but it doesn't work for me in this plasticky feeling fabric. The pants have a high waist, and a drawstring as well as an elasticized waist. The waist fits me fine, without cinching the drawstring, but I suspect that some might find it to be snug. There are two deep pockets, a great idea. This goes in the machine for wash and dry, and that is one thing this odd fabric handles just fine. These pants were not at all what I was expecting in fit, style or feel. If, however, you are looking for SPF pants that are waterproof and loose fitting for outdoors activities, these might be just right for you.
I was hoping the pants would be long, but it’s practically at ankle length when worn on the waist (not tall/long legged girl friendly). I’m 5’8” by the way….planning to return.

I was hoping these would be more like "dress up" dark wash jeans, but they are better suited as "dress down" comfy jeans. They fit well on first try-on, but they stretch out a bit throughout the day, especially in the legs. I needed a pair of comfy jeans anyway, so I will keep these. I do like them for that purpose, but I wouldn't wear them for a night out. I am 5'9" 148 lbs and purchased the 6 Long. The length is good and I have the flexibility to roll them a few times for a more cropped look. I think a 4 would have been too small.

I was iffy about ordering these jeans but love them! My usual size fits & will fit better once I’ve shed the holiday 5 pounds ;) I ordered sky blue & love the naturally faded look. I’m 5’5” but have long legs for my height so was worried they’d look too short on me but they’re perfect. They stretch just enjoying to be comfortable but still hold in problem areas. Can’t wait to wear these jeans with a cute pair of shoes!

I was impressed with this belt based on the price I paid. It is entitled a “leather belt” but down further in the description it states “faux leather” so truly not leather but I wasn’t expecting it to be for $15.00. Still it’s false advertising, hence my 4 stars. Besides that the rest is all positive for the belt I paid for. I’m a 37” waist & went with a large & it wasn’t too large for me. There are 6 holes to the belt & I use hole #5 to buckle it. The material is nice & smooth. There isn’t a flaw to it. It’s 1” wide & the buckle is 1-1/2” wide. The buckle is a nice silver which is shiny but not too shiny. It does come with instructions-per my pictures- as well as a little gadget to use in case the belt is too long. The gadget allows you to unscrew the buckle & cut the belt to shorten it. I’d say the sizing they provide is accurate though. I could’ve gone with a medium. Overall a great belt to wear with jeans or dress pants. A nice color black. I’m happy with this belt, it fits comfortably & I feel it was well worth what I paid. I definitely recommend it.

I was injured in a car accident and gained quite a bit of weight. With that being said, I need to order new pants that would fit my new sizes. I saw these and remembered I had similar pants of a smaller size. I’m a fan of sticking to what I know. I am 5’6” tall. My waist is 31 inches and my hip is 44 inches. According to the size chart, I needed a large. The pants fit true to size. The pants themselves feel like really good quality. They’re lightweight but the material is still heavy. It’s not flimsy or see-through. These pants feel super durable. They’re comfortable yet still give a very professional appearance due to the style and design. Most people hate the scrunchie waist but I love it because it gives room for me to lose weight without having to have the pants tailored. The length of the pants is regular length, not long or short. My one complaint is the buttons. They’re hideous. That’s not a major issue for me because I can just change them.

I was interested in these pants as something comfy to wear to work that would also not be too long since I’m only 5’1”. First I got these pants in navy - I love it and wear it all the time to work. They’re perfect and so comfortable. I got those in an XS. They are the perfect length and the waist comes up to about my belly button - perfect high waist fit. Recently I saw they had black in stock and so I ordered it in an XS also. It is an entirely different size and fit. The waist band is much higher and comes up to my ribs. The length is a full inch longer. They do not fit anything like the navy pair and are just completely unflattering on me. I stupidly took the tag off before trying on the black pair so I have to eat that loss lol

I was leery about these after reading reviews. But I'm so glad I got them! They do feel like actual jeans, not some weird material. Granted, not super thick, but I hate thick denim. I am 5'6" and about 125 lbs. got a M, and they are a great length and fit well in the waist. I was worried they'd be too short, but they are perfect. I got tons of compliments the first time I wore them and everyone was asking where I got them. Would absolutely buy again in a heartbeat!

I was looking for a comfortable jean jacket and finally found one! I’ve had other jean jackets before from Old Navy and Target, but you definitely get what you pay for. This jacket is so comfortable and I look forward to wearing it often. I am 5’6 and about 135. After reading the comments, I purchased a Large because I wanted to be comfy. I think I could’ve gone with a Medium, but not as roomy. I like this size because I can definitely wear it with a sweater when it’s colder.

I was looking for a comfy skort I could wear in the summer and this delivered! I was prepared to be underwhelmed because it had no reviews when I ordered it lol. It definitely exceeded expectations! I'm 5'5, 122lbs and usually around 25in for bottoms. The sizing chart was very accurate and the small fits well! I probably could have gone with an XS for a more snug fit, but I wanted a little room for a more relaxed fit. This is a very comfortable, slightly oversized feel, like a boyfriend jean. The pockets are very deep and the material is soft. Went in the washer and dryer with no problems. Would highly recommend!

I was looking for a cute babydoll dress but didn’t want to pay the high price from some of the boutiques. This is a total must. I’m 5’5 length was good. I got a medium probably could of done a small. Planning on ordering other colors.

I was looking for a denim vest that had a deeper v-cut and this one did not disappoint. It arrived earlier than expected and fit just how I wanted. A snug fit that I wouldn’t have to wear a bra with. I’m 5 ft, 150lbs and ordered a medium. The fabric is decent quality and lightweight which is perfect for living in Florida.
I was looking for a dupe of this Jean, the quality is great! The stones are perfect! I’m very petite 5’1 and 100lbs got a small ad fits great!

I was looking for a good pair of fleece lined leggings to keep me warm during the New England winter. I almost always wear a size small in leggings, but after reading other reviews, sized up to a medium in these, which was a great choice as the mediums fit perfect! The picture shows the length - I am almost 5'5 and they bunch a little at my ankle or I can pull them slightly down onto my heel. I really wanted leggings that I could pull over my heel, but these are a little too short to pull all the way over. Over the heel lined leggings are unfortunately, hard to find, which seems odd since you want to cover more skin in the cold! On a side note, I do also have the BALEAF over the heel leggings (not lined) and I wear a size small in those. The lining is nice and definitely warmer than my unlined leggings, and I like that the pockets are also lined. But I would not say these are extremely warm, and often find myself wearing leg warmers over these. I was going back and forth between a 4 and a 5, I would say 4.5!

I was looking for a mid to high wasted pair of jeans that are on the thinner/looser side and can be worn throughout the year, even in the warmer season. And, a pair that aren't too distressed because there are times when that look just isn't appropriate. These meet all my criteria. There is nothing super special about the way they look, but they can be dressed up or down and are extremely comfortable. I am usually a small or size 26 in jeans (5'4" 118 lbs) but had read these run large so I got the extra small and they fit perfectly. They are very stretchy so I believe will accommodate any body shape, but they don't bag or bunch anywhere on me. I often have that problem with jeans because my hips are so narrow but not with these. These are good everyday jeans and I'd recommend them.

I was looking for a more fitted jacket to wear with my knit dress. I am very pleased with this. It’s soft, stretchy, and buttery smooth. I can’t button it but I expected that as I’m pregnant. Post baby I’m sure it will be just as good. A+ recommend! For reference I am 5’6” wearing an XL, about 227 pounds with the baby.

I was looking for a pair of cargo pants to wear for my first day of work and was too lazy to go to the store to get proper fitted one (this one is on me). I thought a small would be my exact size but I should've went smaller it seems. For a person that is exactly 5'0, I can only wish the tall boots I have, will take this pants off the floor or I will have to return it. Other than that, the material is amazing. You get what you're looking for. Nothing shabby and no false advertisement. Looks exactly like in the picture if you get the perfect size and length. So I won't rate this low and keep it modest.

I was looking for a pair of inexpensive high waisted black shorts for an outfit and found these. Happily surprised. I’m 5’8 203 pounds , I ordered a large and they fit nice and snug. I could’ve went up for a slightly looser fit .. but why?! I took a star off - no belt loops however they really aren’t necessary

I was looking for a pair of Mom jeans and found these. I really loved the color, and probably would have liked the fit, but they are SO SMALL! I am 4’11, 115 lbs, and wear a size 4 in most pants. I could hardly get them over my butt and there was no way these babies were zipping or buttoning! The photos above are as much as I could get them on. Also, they were miles too long for me. If you are tall and very thin, these would probably work, but I would have had to size up one, if not two sizes and I never have to do that with 27’s (size 4) in other pants. I decided not to exchange to a different size because of how long they were and there was no “short” option. Sad they didn’t work out!

I was looking for a pair of wide leg dress pants. I wasn’t expecting to buy yoga pants. I work in corporate. I have worn these twice so far and nobody has noticed. They are so comfortable! They also do not wrinkle easy. I left them crumpled up on the floor in my room, and wore them again with no wrinkles. For reference, I am 5’7” I weigh 164 pounds size 10 jeans. I got the size large with the 31 inch inseam and they fit perfect! I will definitely be ordering another color. The only thing I wish they didn’t have is in the butt it comes down slightly in a V shape which I feel I need to hide with my sweater. I feel like that’s the only thing that really gives it away that they are yoga pants. Other than that I have no complaints about these pants!!

I was looking for a pant that is similar to the anthro Colette pant without the $128 price tag!! IM IN LOVE!! buttery soft, most most comfortable pants you will ever put on. Already ordered another color! I’m 5’3 and am wearing a 28! True to size!

I was looking for a wide leg pair of jeans, and these seem to be perfect. The fabric is quality and they are stylish and affordable. Waistline is not at all restricting which is great. I got size 6 regular. I'm 5'6" 140 lbs. I recommend.

I was looking for a wide-legged pant to go with my top. I purchased these in Orange and Red in sizes L, XL and XXL. I ended up going with the Orange pants in XL. At the time, I was about 210 lbs and I am 5'5".These are nice pants. They are a bit thin, so when I wore them, I put on a boy short underneath to smooth out the look. The crotch area is a bit high for my taste. So, even though they fit great, the crotch area can look a bit tight, giving the perception that they are too small, which was not the case. With a slight heel, I was great to go without having to hem them.I felt the Orange color 'popped' better over the Red, but both are nice colors.

I was looking for black jeans but with a little different look. These are a lighter material than regular denim jeans, has a good stretch to it. I ordered size 8 (I am 5'4, 150lbs) they are very comfortable, a touch snug at the waist but lots of leg room. Front and back pockets are both functional (yes!) These look very cute dressed up with heels but will also look nice dressed down with sandals or sneakers.

I was looking for casual pants to wear for quick errands and light walks. These pants are great for that. The material is yoga/ workout ish type. This pants not meant for winter or to keep you warm. I normally wear size 6, 26/27 and the Small is a good fit without being too tight. I am 5’7” and the length hits right at the ankle.

I was looking for fleece-lined leggings for when I move to the mountains this winter, and I’ll be spending a ton of time outdoors through my work, but also working in a very casual-dress office environment as well. I’ve lived in the area before, and I needed to stock up on pieces I can layer. I seriously just ordered three more pairs of these leggings, because they’re on sale, and the cabin I’ll be living in has access to a washer/dryer, but our buildings operate on solar power, and to conserve our energy I’ll likely drive to the laundromat every few weeks, and these are the most comfortable, attractive, versatile leggings I own. I can layer them with my other thermal tights/leggings for extra warmth if needed in the office, or layer them under ski-pants or thicker hiking pants outside. Also, I just wore them to lunch with a friend today, they look fantastic, so I just wore them with a long-sleeved more dressy top and they were great on their own. I am 5’4” and 128-130 lbs, and curvy hourglass shape, more curvy on the top though. My regular bottom half measurements are included in the photos I’ve attached. The mediums fit very well, even though most of my leggings are smalls, I wanted something looser and able to layer over another pair of fleece leggings for cold days - and these leggings are soft and so stretchy that I can comfortably wear them alone or layer below with another thin thermal layer. I love that they’re lined leggings, but especially since I sized up a little, they aren’t inappropriately clingy. The waistband is soft, stretchy, and not constricting at all. The waistband on the medium is a little loose on me, but not in a way that they’re baggy or would fall down, or that anyone would notice. Im curled up on the couch writing this right now, and regardless of how I sit or lay down, they’re comfortable and flexible. The leggings are opaque and not sheer at all. They’ll provide a great “blue jean” looking cover that I can wear my super stretchy fleece lined leggings under if needed. I just bought another pair of the blue, and two pairs of the black. Thank you to the poster that mentioned piling. Because of it, I washed these the same way I wash my more traditional looking fleece lined leggings - in mesh laundry bags on a cold delicate cycle and then hang to dry. I’ll update my review if there’s any issue with piling with this laundry routine, but I haven’t had any yet.

I was looking for lightweight comfort on a pair of casual slacks. I noticed that they felt a little scratchy and checked the tag. Polyester and spandex. Not cotton. Also about three inches too short. I'm 5'8". Otherwise, fit was fine.

I was looking for more work clothes that are fall colors and love the wide leg trouser look and decided to order these pants. I am 5’ 10” and weigh 145 lb and I ordered the medium long. These are the right fit and length, and are very flattering. The material is not too thick nor too thin and I expect to be able to wear these year round. There are four deep pockets that will easily hold my large phone and other essentials. Overall, these trousers are very flattering and the sizing guide was very accurate. The material is very comfortable and these pants are not too thick nor too thin. They are great trousers for work.

I was looking for some comfy pants to wear during spring and summer. I’m in love with these pants, like the rest of the reviewers. I’m two months post partum, 5’9 and 220lbs. While the reviews said there was lots of stretch, I was hesitant to order my true size (XL). I ordered a 2x and it was too big. I can take them off without unbuttoning the pants! I ordered a white in 1x and fushia in xl. The xl definitely fits and is super comfortable, but as the pictures show, there is more bunching in the legs so I think the 1xl fits a little better out of the dried but the xl is better at the end of the day because it doesn’t stretch out as much. I washed the pants according to the directions and I did not notice shrinking. My pink pants did not bleed either. The white pants are see through so wear a long shirt and light underwear. Can’t go wrong with this price or these colors!

I was looking for the perfect red flair pants to wear to Christmas events and got these after reading several reviews. You will NOT regret this purchase!! I’ve worn them twice and have gotten SOOOOO Many compliments!!! They were a littIe long on me as I am 5’4” so I did have to use double sided tape to hem the bottoms but that was an easy fix! I love that the waist is a high rise & that the material is not stiff at all. I def order want to order in other colors!

I was looking forward to receiving these jeans. Overall they are comfortable and stretchy. I was searching for a petite boot cut and made a point of getting an explantion of shot verses petite. My understanding was that "short" was shorter than "petite". I am 5'11/2" and I am wearing shoes that add an inch or so. I was walking all over them. I folded them to a relaxed length coming just above the bottom of the heal of my shoe. I do not understand how these companies measure. I went to a clothing store at the mall and purchased a petite 14 and it was the perfect length, but twice the price on sale. Levi's have been around long enough to have figured this out.
I was needing to replace my old jean jacket and this one popped up. I first tried the large, but sleeves were too long and shoulders too wide. The medium fit perfect. I am 5' 5" and weigh 135 lbs.

I was nervous about buying jeans online because it's hard to find ones that fit my body type; smaller waist, bigger butt. I'd always have trouble with gapping in the back. These jeans arrived today and I eagerly tried them on. They fit like a glove! No gapping! Super stretchy and comfortable despite me being bloated today. I'm so happy bell bottoms are back in fashion. I haven't had a pair since I was in elementary school lol! For reference I'm 5ft 9in and about 150lbs. I got the large due to other reviews saying they run small. Listen to that advice! If I followed the size chart and got the recommended medium they would definitely be too small! Also the length!! Omg it's perfect! Highly recommend!

I was nervous about buying these but I’m so glad I got them! I’m 5’0, 125-130lbs. These fit me securely but not too tight! They hug my hips and they are a great length. I would love to purchase a few pair of pants if this brand sells any 🥹😂

I was nervous about buying these but I’m so glad I got them! I’m 5’0, 125-130lbs. These fit me securely but not too tight! They hug my hips and they are a great length. I would love to purchase a few pair of pants if this brand sells any 🥹😂

I was nervous about them not fitting in time for the bachelorette party I was attending, but they fit perfectly! They seem to be true to size. I’m 5’9” and ordered a size 12! I normally wear an XL in pants. I really like these pants and definitely will order more.

I was nervous about these because I’m 5’7 and wanted to wear heels with them but it worked out! I wish they were just a couple inches longer for me but I’m sure everyone else will appreciate the length. They were super comfortable all night and nice and light material. I’m going to definitely order in more colors!

I was nervous about these being too long and small but I am pleased!! They fit nicely with a comfortable stretchy material. The length is great with platform sandals or a heel (I’m 5’3”). They come over the muffin top right at the bottom of my belly button. The waist is a little loose but I’m thicker below waist so that’s normal for me. All in all I LOVE these pants!

I was nervous about this, as I’ve never worn a romper, always afraid I couldn’t pull it off with my belly and thick thighs and booty. I don’t think that anymore!!!!! This fits like a dream, has great coverage of my belly bc of the way it lays, and honestly makes my butt look pretty amazing. Toot toot lol. The material is not super thick, but it’s thick enough that it doesn’t show every (or any for that matter!) cellulite ripples. I’m 5’2 but have on 2.5in heels in the photo, 190lbs, and got a xl for reference. If you’re like me and have though about buying a romper but haven’t yet but the bullet….THIS IS YOUR SIGN!

I was nervous after reading many of the reviews but these shorts fit amazing. I’m usually a size 6 in jeans and mediums fit perfect. I have a small waist and a decent booty, usually if things fit my butt they’re loose on my waist but these are perfect! They are a bit short but Im also 5’8. Overall I’m very pleased. I’m about 40in in the hips and 29in in the waist for reference.

I was nervous and excited! I’m 5’11 and 140 and HATE ordering clothes on line from stores that I haven’t tried. They fit as expected and are cute! Not too short and not too long! I like the 2 buttons for added detail. Pockets are nice and deep. The inseam is 4”- great for me! Not too tight in the thighs. Definitely an Amazon win.

I was nervous purchasing with no reviews so I went for it. They are a little thinner than I expected but will be perfect for summer. Can’t complain for the price. You can’t tell from the picture but they are big (my fault I always upsize). I’m 5’3” 194 lbs and ordered 2XL. I will definitely order again but will order the XL next time. The XXL fit like my size 14 Silver Jeans.
I was nervous that this skirt was going to be too small but it fit perfectly. I’m a 5/6 in jeans, 5’5 and 147-152 lbs.

I was nervous to purchase these because I’ve gained a lot of weight since having a baby and covid so I had no idea about size, but I am 5’7” and 160 pounds, the medium was PERFECT. These pants are so stretchy and comfortable, I am in LOVE. For the price, you can’t go wrong! I’m so happy I stumbled across these, I’m definitely going to be purchasing one in every color! I haven’t washed them yet, but I will update my review if anything goes awry!

I was not a belt girl until I got this one lol. I love the way it looks and the gold color has a nice shine to it. I’m 5’5 and I got the smallest size and fits me well! Only downside is that you can feel that the quality is pretty bad (however for the price what can you expect?) but other than that good!

I was not a belt girl until I got this one lol. I love the way it looks and the gold color has a nice shine to it. I’m 5’5 and I got the smallest size and fits me well! Only downside is that you can feel that the quality is pretty bad (however for the price what can you expect?) but other than that good!

I was not expecting such a great fit -- perfect, really -- of these on me. I'm 5'5", about 142lbs, typically size 4-6 in most major brands, and the size 6 fits perfectly. No waist gap, no uncomfortable snugness anywhere, hits right at my waist; even the length works for me. The wide legs are pretty wide, bordering on baggy; I think I'm going to get them tailored slightly so they're less palazzo-like and drape more similarly to Levi's Ribcage Wide Leg (which I love the width of the legs, but Levi's just generally do not fit me well in the waist, butt, and thigh areas). These have a bit of stretch as well. I love them. I got them in another color, and have another on the way -- they're that great!

I was not happy with these jeans I bought a medium. I’m normally a large weighing in at 170 5’4 . The bottom of the legs are not skinny jeans at all like in the picture. I had to roll them up at the bottom to give a more appealing look. I also had to pull them up as if they were hiwaist pants and put a belt on for them to even fit halfway decent. I tried to send them back for a small and the only option they gave was to get my money back.

I was not sure about buying this Jean but they are way better than what l was expecting. They fit just perfect and the quality is really good. I can't believe I got this for less than $25. I am ordering two more right now. I am 180 lbs and l bought number 8. They fit more than perfect.

I was on the fence about getting a 24 or 25. I went with 24 based on measurements and it’s perfect! Proper low rise, hugs the right places, and comfy. It feels tight at first but has a little bit of stretch room. For reference I’m 5’3”, 24in waist, 35 inch hip
I was on the fence about these, but I’m so glad I bought them! They are so comfy, and cute! I’m 5’10 and they were perfectly long enough too.

I was on the look out for a new denim jacket and couldn't be happier! I'm 5' 3", 165lbs and ordered a large. The fit is loose, the color is perfect, it's comfy, sylish, and could be dressed up or dressed down. If you're looking for a feminine denim jacket then add to cart!

I was pleasantly impressed with these pants. I am 5'6", 29" waist, 40" (39") hips, 136lbs. These feel a bit like parachute pants. They are 17% nylon after all. But they do have a good amount of stretch to them. I wish they were a little more supportive in the rear and that might have been achievable maybe one size down if I thought they were really stretchy enough for that sort of feature but that's just wishful thinking for a forty-something y/o whose assets aren't where they used to be. The waistband is very comfortable, the length is just where I want it, and I think they look really good on my body. As for my measurements, I am 5'6" but I have short-ish legs and a long torso - specifically my "rise". Like, high-rise pants fit me more like mid-rise because there is over eleven inches between my crotch and my bely button. I mention this because these pants are a little tight in the crotch for me and have a little camel toe effect but the waist is so forgiving, I can adjust and pull them down whenever I feel them creeping up in there;) Plus they are black and it's not noticeable. I don't think that would be the case with lighter colors though which is a bummer because I like these pants so much I'm tempted to buy them in all the colors. Anyway, lots of reviews complaining about how they don't hold up to washing but it clearly states that these pants are best dry cleaned. I never dry clean anything so I'll probably wash on cold in the gentle or hand wash cycle and hang to dry. I included front (heeled and flat footed), back, and side pics because I know that even someone with the same measurements as me may have a different shape. Hope this info helps.

I was pleasantly surprised at how much I loved these! Not too long and the perfect length with a little heel. I’m 5’3 and the fit so perfectly in all the right places. They have a heavier feel to them but do have stretch. I’m 165 and bought a size 10.

I was pleasantly surprised at the quality for the price of this jumpsuit. The material is thin, but not too thin that you can see through the jumpsuit. I’m 5’ 4” and ordered a size medium for a loose fit. Order a size down if you want a more snug fit.

I was pleasantly surprised by the quality and comfort of this product.Good quality and comfortable. I took the plunge as we are traveling abroad. I love the flattering pockets. The only small con is they are very high waisted for someone 5’5. I do have a difficult shape to fit So please start making more colors!

I was pleasantly surprised by the quality of this belt, the strap is sturdy and the buckle is comparable to the ones I've seen at Urban Outfitters or Topshop. I have a 25" waist and bought the 24"-28" belt. The fit is quite true to size. In addition, the width of the belt is about 1 inch, which might be a tight fit if your belt loops are on the smaller side. I've worn this belt maybe 10+ times and have noticed minimal scuffing. Overall, it's a great quality belt for a decently inexpensive price.

I was pleasantly surprised by these high-waisted flare jeans. They fit true to size and are incredibly stretchy and comfortable. The material feels like a cross between jeans and jeggings, offering the best of both worlds: stretch and comfort. The jeans hug my curves nicely and flare at the bottom. While they're not overly long for my 5'3" height, they wouldn't be too short for someone taller.

I was pleasantly surprised by these pants. The inseam says 20 inches. Being that I'm only 4'11 I was hoping that they would fit more like a wide leg crop instead of a capris. They fit just as I was hoping!! I'm about 140lbs and usually wear size 10 and the sizing was spot on. The material seems to be nice quality with a little stretch! I would recommend and plan to order another color.

I was pleasantly surprised with this denim jacket since I have had a hard time finding one. It is nice quality, thick, soft somewhat stretchy-feeling denim. The fit was great--I am 5'5", 115lb with a long torso and arms. I almost always have to wear a medium jacket for the extra length but I ordered a small after reading the reviews. Fits perfect!! It's not boxy but a nice balance of fitted without being tight (fyi I'm pregnant in this pic so the jacket sticks out more than it would normally). The bottom hits at my hips and the sleeves hit below my wrists and will also be easy to roll up when I want crop sleeves.

I was ready to love these jeans because of the shape and style, but unfortunately I’m stuck with a pair of jeans that stretches out too much and looks too big after just one wear. I’m 5’7, 180lb, 33” waist, 45” hip - based on the size chart first I ordered size 14, they fit somewhat big and didn’t “suck me in” at all, so I exchanged them for a size 12. At first 12 fit pretty well, comfortable, just loose enough but not sloppy or baggy. However after just one wear, they stretched out too much and are not as flattering as I would like them to be. I should have sized down at least to a 10. As far as the quality - these jeans are well made, no complaints. I feel like the color is somewhat different in person, definitely has a “vintage” look to it. Not a deal breaker just a matter of personal preference. Bottom line - if it wasn’t for the sizing, these jeans could have been a good find.

I was really excited for these pants and love the way they look online. In person I was disappointed a little with some aspects. For reference I am 5‘,5“ tall and 115 pounds. My measurements are 26 inch waist and 38 inch hips. I ordered the size extra small and it fit perfectly. It was even slightly snug in the waist and hips on me, but not a dealbreaker. I was disappointed online the color is a very pretty light sky blue. However in person it’s a darker, dusty blue color. I already have pants this color and really wanted a light pale, blue pant. The other thing I didn’t care for are the front pleats they’re not very flattering and add a little bit of bulk to me. Finally they were also a little bit short. I’m only 5‘5“ tall and these fell right at my ankles to where I really need to wear flats with them in order for them to not look like high waters. I typically like my pants longer, and to cover most of my shoe. All in all they are an OK pair of pants. I wasn’t thrilled at the color in person is not the same and didn’t particularly like the front pleats but I will still wear them. Hope that helps!

I was really excited to get these jeans. I loved the look of the darker wash option. However, the wash received was NO where close to the image. The image had a strong fade to it and a different tone of blue. The jeans I received are a true blue color with slight fading. The quality seems a little on the cheaper side, and the fit was off for me. I’m 5’9” and a size 4. The small was a tad too short. No true pockets either. Disappointing and I will be returning.

I was really excited to receive these overalls especially since it’s spring time! I immediately tried them on as soon and I got them and was really surprised with how well they fit. I’m 5’ 1 and typically have issues with my height and body type when it comes to clothing I buy online. Absolutely love how adjustable the straps are. Legs are just slightly too long for me but no problem, I prefer the cuffed jean look anyways. 10/10 recommend!!

I was really excited to try these since my family literally calls me an ice cube (freezing all the time), and these looked perfect. Well, when I tried them on, they were WAY too short. I am 5’7” for reference. The leggings also made its own pudge when I bent forward, and I felt like they overemphasized my crotch area pretty much hiking up either side of it. They felt very warm, but they didn’t have the appearance of good quality even if they were. I know the wrinkles might come out with a wash, but with all the things I didn’t like about them especially the length which can’t be fixed, I didn’t want to wash them and then be unable to return them.

I was really happy to find out that there were real actual usable pockets in the front instead of the fake pockets that they always put on women’s pants. However, the pockets in the back are fake. Cant win ‘um all, I guess!The pants are very stretchy, so they’ll give a very slimming fit with a tighter appearance. However, you can expect to still be very comfortable in these pants due to them being so stretchy. I’m about 5’7” or 5’8” and about 180 pounds and purchased a size XL, and I’d say they were a good fit and perfect length. Also, I carry most of my weight in my hips, butt, and thighs, and usually I feel like my hips look just too big, but these pants really gave a nice and natural slimming affect (or effect? Ahhhh I’m always forgetting the difference!) for me and my body type.Also I love that these pants have belt loops! these pants look amazing with a nice tucked in blouse or sweater with a cute belt. Just keep in mind that the belt can’t be too wildly thick because the belt loops are still just a tad bit smaller than average.There’s one con with these pants though, and it’s that they are very susceptible to wrinkles. If they come out wrinkly from the dryer, that’s really not a big issue because once you put them on, they’ll stretch around you so nicely that the pants won’t have wrinkles anymore. The issue is that once you’ve been wearing them all day or for a couple of hours, they’ll start to wrinkle and crease around the knees and crotch area. The pictures I’m sharing is after I’ve worn the pants all day at work, so you can see what I mean about the wrinkles. I find this to be a common problem with a lot of pants and honestly these pants are not as bad about it as some others because some other pants can start to wrinkle up so bad around the crotch area that they start to give the appearance of a camel toe, but these don’t ever get that bad. There’s an easy solution for you though if you’re worried about this happening, just buy them in black. The black won’t show the wrinkles like the colored pants. I’m probably going to buy a pair in black too because these really would be the perfect pair of just plain professional black pants to have around. However, I still really love the green pair that I purchased even despite the wrinkles, and I will continue to wear them! These pants are still so super flattering, and that’s why I just couldn’t take a star off for the wrinkles.**UPDATE**So I did end up buying the black pair of these really soon after I had purchased the green pair. Both of these pants have become my absolute favorite professional pants to wear. I literally wear the black pair almost once a week because they’re just such an easy professional go-to and go with almost everything. The vibrant coloring for both pants has never faded. However, I’m coming back to deduct a star because I have had to restitch all the belt loops on both pants. The stitching quality on these pants is downright terrible. For that, these pants should at least be cheaper because if we are all going to have to spend an hour restitching these pants then we all deserve a serious discount for them. Now, maybe it’s just because I have a bigger butt and hips, and I’m always having to pull up my pants by the belt loops, but still, I don’t have to restitch the belt loops on my other pants. Also, I’ve noticed that the stitched seam that goes down the butt looks like it’s starting to loosen and might eventually break or rip soon. I really hope that doesn’t happen because I love these pants so much. They’re so comfortable and such a great fit. I’ve honestly been debating buying more pants in different colors, but I haven’t yet because I don’t know if it’s worth it paying like $26 + having to restitch the belt loops again & the pants may not even last a whole year as I’m worried about with my black pair. Ugh, again, I can’t express enough how much I love these pants and how they look, but I hate that the quality is greatly lacking with the stitching so purchase at your own risk knowing you’ll have to re-sew them ):

I’m 5ft 7in, 165lbs, carrying most of my weight in my belly. I wear 8/10 bottoms and M/L tops. I ordered size Large. I liked how much stretch there was but it’s almost too much. I suspect these won’t hold their shape over time and jeans this stretchy tend to accentuate my belly vs slimming it. Cute from the front, not as much from the side. The fabric is a bit rough and scratchy on my skin. The belt is super cute. These just touched the floor with bare feet, but became too short with a sneaker on. Because of that I would only wear these with flip flops and that’s just not versatile enough to add this piece to my wardrobe. Will be returning. Bummer :(

I was really nervous about buying such a baggy style jean with my body type. I’m 5’0” and about 155lbs, with a curvy, athletic build. Usually, baggy clothes are not my friend, but I have always wanted to pull off the look so I bought these before a vacation! Wasn’t sure during my first try-on, but they became my fav jeans on my trip. I’m getting used to styling them and pairing them with different tops, but really happy with my purchase. They’re a gorgeous color, feel really high quality, and fit just how I wanted to — although I did size up. My one complaint is that they’re a little loose in the waist, but that’s on me because I could’ve purchased a smaller size and opted to go with the oversized fit. I also DO have to wear platform shoes in an effort to keep these off the ground and they still barely touch when I do. All in all, great jeans!!! Definitely a closet staple for me now.

A great purchase and definitely a recommend from me for anyone looking for quality good looking pants at a reasonable price.

I was skeptical buying pants for work online without trying them on and read tons of reviews first before buying. While I was looking for a lower rise pant and not one that goes to my belly button, these are amazing in every other way. They fit so nicely, keep the crease well in the leg, and look professional. They are great to wear more casually with a blouse tucked in but also would pair nicely with a suit jacket for more formal days when I don’t want to wear a skirt. I am definitely going to check out the other colors. I love the chunky waistband, it gives some personality without being over the top as I don’t ever wear belts. For reference I am 5’ 3” and they do drag the ground if I’m not in heels so I imagine with wearing flats most days the bottoms will get tattered if I don’t hem them up a bit. I am not sure how they will hold up after multiple washings but I am hopeful! They did not stretch throughout the day and start falling off like most other pants seem to do. Overall very happy and impressed for the price.

I was skeptical of these pants, since most in this style are too short on me. I generally look for a 33 inch inseam on my pants. These surprised me. They fit as expected. I’m 5’7 plus a little (I used to be 5’8” but I have scoliosis) and 205 lbs. I normally wear 14/16 and I ordered an XL. I don’t wear heels often (prefer flats) but the third picture is me on my tippy toes. They allow for heels if you bring them down slightly up top. I also appreciate the placement of the second seam up top. It doesn’t split the belly like some pants do. I already ordered a second pair and I might order more. If you’re a taller lady that gets discouraged over the inseams, give these pants a chance. :-) Shorter ladies will likely need to hem them.

I was so bummed, I was hoping to find my new favorite jeggings in multiple colors :-( Material, quality of workmanship and color is really good. I always wear leggings and jeggings in a U.S. large (That has been my go to size for years). I'm 5'3.5 in tall and 157lbs. I have been wearing time and Tru jeggings forever. When I took these out of the bag I was shocked at how small the waist was. I haven't worn anything that looked anywhere near that size for over 25 years! I tried them anyway since I heard they were super stretchy and couldn't do them up, massive muffin top! Unlike my Time and Tru's which are very comfy. They also are not high waisted at all. I've attached pics of my standard Time and Tru jeggings and these. There is a 5 inch difference! (There was no way I was going to post a pic with my belly hanging out). If you have a very small waist for a large (vs. a belly like me), a large 'might' work for you, but I'd still consider sizing up by at least 1 size.

I was so excited about these and was not disappointed! They are awesome and fit perfectly. They totally look like real jeans. I usually get large (5'7"/160lbs) in leggings and the L/XL is a great fit. I ordered the one that came with 2 pair. The blue ones are pretty short and the grayish ones go to my ankle and I actually had to cuff them to look right with my booties. Overall these are super comfy and I highly recommend trying them!

I was so excited to finally have some nice pants..... they did not send the size ordered. The price tag and the product tag were not the same size. Well.... my daughter can wear them atleast. I was so excited to find Democracy Jeans because I typically have trouble finding jeans that fit my waist comfortably. (I’m 5’7 and 140 pounds. I’d describe my body type as slim but with excess weight in the belly area.) I usually wear a 6, but these jeans were so stretchy that the 6 was too large everywhere so I exchanged for a 4. The 4 fits so nicely at the waist and really hides my stomach! Sitting down is comfortable and I don’t have a bright red waistband line across my stomach when I take these off! But the fit in the legs and butt is too large (definitely doesn’t give me the promised lift) and there are little folds of excess material everywhere. Also, the fly won’t stay up to save my life! Every time I stand up, the barn door is WIDE open. Overall, these jeans deliver comfort… and I love that they exist to accommodate more body types! But I don’t think mine is one of them :(

I was so excited to get these based on other reviews but sadly it was a weird fit. Unfortunately, while my butt looked pretty good, there was SO much room in front that it just didn’t look good at all. Also, the material doesn’t really feel like it would hold up after too many washes.

I was so excited to get these insulated jeans, just in time for cooler weather! The quality is nice, but the fit just doesn't work for me. (5' 10" 155 lbs. 30" inseam wearing a size L) Pros: Cozy, soft insulated jeans that look like any other pair of jeans. Color and stone washing add cute styling. They do fit fairly true to size, just not quite right for me. They feel like quality materials. Cons: They are too short! To be fair, most standard jeans are, but these feel extra short. They bunch funny around the knee. The fit at my waist, hips, bum looks like riding pants...too loose in the wrong places. I'm keeping the pants, I don't hate them, I will just wear high boots and long sweaters, sweatshirts or jackets to hide the akward parts and enjoy the warmth of these soft insulated jeans.

I truly thought I'd found my perfect summer shorts and would be returning to purchase more colors. However...CONS: The spandex... Unreal! Ugh.If you're considering these I'd either reconsider or size down a size...

I was so excited when I received the Belle Poque Denim Skirt. It looked beautiful on the model in the photos. Unfortunately for me, that was not the case. I'm 5'5", and this skirt fell to just above my ankles (see photo). Granted, the model looks like she's wearing this above her naval - I found that if I hiked the skirt up just as high, that I was looking way off proportion. In addition, the sizing is off. I wear a size 12 and have a waist size of 34. I ordered per the sizing chart, which recommended an XL. Unfortunately, the XL skirt fits me pretty loosely - and on top of that, this skirt has a decent amount of stretch in it. I wanted to love this skirt, but to make it fit well - I'd have to take it to a tailor to have it shortened to my knee length. I deducted 1 star for the inaccurate sizing chart and somewhat misleading "knee length" in the title. Despite these issues, the fabric feels nice and soft. One note: after it's washed and dried - you may need to iron over the bottom hem as it likes to flip up.

I was super nervous to get these, all the reviews said to size down but i’m the type to rather have them be a little big than too small. I vary between a medium and a large, typically go with a large to leave room for any shrinkage in the wash. I was also very concerned about the length as some reviews said they were too short. I am 5’7 and have an issue with pants being too short. these fit perfect length and size wise! so happy I went with a medium. I am 160lbs with a little bit of a bigger butt/thighs and a smaller stomach. even with getting a medium there is so much room for stretch and growth!! they are a little loud but honestly when I wear these to the bars no one will know. perfect length and perfect size. i’d say if you’re in between sizes, SIZE DOWN! there is so much stretch I feel like even if I got a small I could make them work (maybe a little uncomfortable) but doable. so happy!!

I was SUPER skeptical of these jeans but they are really great. I like them A LOT. I gave them 4 stars only because A) the material is such that if you have cellulite or rolls of any kind, it will probably show (the material is a little thinner) and B) because if they offered an extra small option I would probably need it but it’s not available. For reference I’m 5’5” weigh 108 lbs and my dimensions are 32-24.5-35.5. I wear a small or extra small in most clothing. I often have a hard time with pants because despite not being super tall all of my height is in my legs. So the typical 28-29 inch inseam provided by most woman’s pants is just too short. (I look for 32 inseams whenever I can find them!) But these fit great! I’d prefer they be a little bit snugger around my butt and upper thighs but all things considered these pants are a win for sure. I would say pay close attention to the photo provided by the manufacturer of the pants listing the dimensions. They seem to be pretty accurate. Seriously, give these pants a shot. Especially if you’re someone who has a hard time finding them long enough. They aren’t the longest pants I own BUT they are longer than average for sure. And they are very stretchy. I can see now why people reverence being able to fit into smaller sizes quite comfortably. I’m going to buy a few more pair in different colors :) UPDATE: Love LOVE these pants!! I got them in more colors and they all fit great. They seem to wash well too. So far the colors haven’t bled at all (though I have washed them with like colors) and they have not shrunk. I have not but them in the dryer though. I did see that some of the sizing is inconsistent but nothing significant. Also, the white pants are a bit see through so be prepared to purchase nude undies for when you wear them. Otherwise I am so super happy with this pants and I can’t stress enough how hard it is to find them that fit right (especially online). TRY THESE!!! You won’t regret it.

I had a baby 4 months ago, weigh 127ish pounds and have a little pooch in the front. I love them. I've been looking for a pair just like these. I ordered a Medium!

I was surprised by how thick these pants are, and I'm slightly concerned I will be too hot in them, but maybe when the weather cools, I'll appreciate that extra thickness. The outside layer isn't the coziest feel, but these pants are lined, and the liner is fairly comfortable and not scratchy. Because they are so thick, I didn't expect them to be flattering, but they're actually not too bad. They lie nicely and disguise anything unflattering with their interesting texture. Based on reviews, I went with the 29" and they are plenty long. For reference, I am 5'5". I think the longer length will only be necessary for those who are 5'7" or over, but that's just my opinion. Overall, a decent pair of drawstring pants.

I was surprised how much I liked these jeans. I am 5'8" 125lbs and I ordered size 6. I went off the size chart and got the six because of the waist measurement. These fit well, but I probably could have gotten the size 4 for a more fitted look and still had a comfortable fit. The material is soft and stretchy, and also not too thin. These are straight wide leg and high waist. They also have a line detail down the front which is elongating and flattering. The length was ok, it hit right at my ankles, but I was kind of hoping they would be longer and slouchier like in the web pic. So, if you are above 5'8 they might hit short unless you are going for the ankle or cropped look. They have actually useable pockets on the front and back, as well. Overall, a really comfortable and cute pair of jeans, but pay attention to the length and you might want to size down.

I was surprised these “jeggings” are actually real denim and have functional pockets. The only thing that doesn’t qualify them as jeans is a zipper, I suppose. I’m 115lbs, 5’7”, 27”Waist, 35”Hips, 18”Thighs, and got an XS. I have zero curves, but these make it look like I might actually have hips.
